content.fact_text: Security utility module implementing HMAC-SHA256 signing/verification and PII scrubbing.

provenance_data.behaviour: Provides cryptographic integrity verification (HMAC-SHA256) and data privacy scrubbing for event payloads. It enforces deterministic canonicalization for signing and constant-time comparison for verification to mitigate timing attacks.
provenance_data.utility: Provides production-grade message integrity verification and PII scrubbing utilities for event-driven architectures.
